previewCards.title: Mask Overlay Preview
previewCards.description: Shows masked or excluded intervals overlaid on the full recording preview.

previewCards.title: Sleep Diary Overlay
previewCards.description: Shows sleep diary annotations over the actigraphy time series, with naps and nocturnal sleep distinguished visually.

previewCards.title: Light Overlay Preview - To be Added
previewCards.description: Shows light exposure alongside activity when the loaded file includes light channels.

resultCards.title: Metric Summary Visual
resultCards.description: Plot or structured summary of the selected metric output.

resultCards.title: Tabular Output
resultCards.description: Table of computed summary values and method settings.

resultCards.title: Methods Summary
resultCards.description: Human-readable description of the selected processing steps, algorithms, and parameters for reporting.

resultCards.title: Overlay Output
resultCards.description: Preview of masks, diary overlays, or algorithm-derived binary series.
